coat_base_locus.label: Base Coat Locus
coat_base_locus.notes: Controls the default base coat color before epistatic masking.

coat_extension_locus.label: Extension Locus
coat_extension_locus.notes: Homozygous e/e masks dark pigment expression into cream/yellow-type coats.

coat_dilution_locus.label: Dilution Locus
coat_dilution_locus.notes: Reserved for future dilute color expression.

ear_carriage_locus.label: Ear Carriage Locus
ear_carriage_locus.notes: Controls ear posture and size traits.

tail_carriage_locus.label: Tail Carriage Locus
tail_carriage_locus.notes: Controls tail carriage and tail length variants.

body_size_locus.label: Body Size Locus
body_size_locus.notes: Major body size class. Polygenic size will eventually expand beyond this simple locus.

temperament_locus.label: Temperament Locus
temperament_locus.notes: High-level behavior inheritance placeholder before full behavior genetics.

domestication_locus.label: Domestication Locus
domestication_locus.notes: Controls broad domestication expression and future neural-crest-linked traits.
